name: StreamCardano.Api

values.name: credentials
values.type: { r | host : String.String, key : String.String } -> StreamCardano.Api.Credentials

values.name: getLastBlock
values.comment: Checking StreamCardano is up-to-date with the Cardano network.
values.type: (Result.Result Http.Error StreamCardano.Data.LastBlock.LastBlock -> msg) -> StreamCardano.Api.Credentials -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: getStatus
values.comment: SEND a basic request to check if the Service is online. No authentication is required.
values.type: (Result.Result Http.Error StreamCardano.Data.Status.Status -> msg) -> StreamCardano.Api.Credentials -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: postQuery
values.comment: Selecting data with a custom SQL query.
values.type: (Result.Result Http.Error StreamCardano.Data.Query.Query -> msg) -> StreamCardano.Api.Credentials -> String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: postQueryDebug
values.comment: Selecting data with a custom SQL query. **Use Debug endpoint**
values.type: (Result.Result Http.Error StreamCardano.Data.Query.Query -> msg) -> StreamCardano.Api.Credentials -> String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg
